plugins.name: FAIR-science
plugins.description: Scaffold, audit, and verify reproducible/FAIR data-analysis repos for computational biology: setup-repo, env-audit, reproduce, fair-audit.

plugins.name: hpc-jupyter-vscode
plugins.description: Launches a JupyterLab server on a SLURM compute node (via sbatch) and tunnels it to VSCode as a remote Jupyter kernel, with an idle-timeout safety net.
